entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 110 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
